description_long: This object consists of two modern firearms with long cylindrical suppressors attached to their barrels, crossed in an 'X' formation. The firearms have a metallic silver and black finish, with textured black grips and visible trigger guards. The suppressors are matte black and extend significantly beyond the muzzle, giving the weapons a sleek, tactical appearance. The frames and slides are metallic, with some areas showing a brushed or polished finish, and the grips appear to be made of a textured polymer or rubber for improved handling. The trigger guards are rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A pair of modern handguns with long black suppressors, crossed in an 'X' shape, featuring metallic frames and textured black grips.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the circular ends of the suppressors and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the crossed configuration, metallic frames, and textured black grips.
description_view_2: Top-down view similar to view 0, emphasizing the suppressor ends and barrel alignment.
description_view_3: Front angled view similar to view 1, showing the crossed handguns and their ergonomic grips.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical suppressor attached, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, robust with smooth edges
